Labor Only Moving Help

Support for loading, unloading, and in-home moving.

Use labor-only movers when you already have the truck, storage unit, POD, or container — and need a professional crew to handle the physical work.

Labor Only Moving

Professional Movers When You Already Have Transportation

Labor-only moving is the right service when you do not need a full moving truck package, but you still need trained movers to handle the physical work.

Atlantic Star Relocations helps with loading and unloading rental trucks, moving containers, trailers, PODS, storage units, apartments, homes, offices, and furniture inside the same building.

Our focus is simple: protect the furniture, organize the load, move efficiently, and keep the job under control from start to finish.

Best For

  • Loading or unloading a U-Haul, Penske, Budget, trailer, or rental truck
  • PODS, moving containers, and storage unit loading
  • Same-building moves, elevator moves, and furniture rearranging
  • Heavy item lifting, apartment moves, and packing support
How It Works

Simple Labor-Only Moving Process

1

Tell Us the Job

Share the pickup address, inventory, stairs or elevator, truck/container type, and preferred date.

2

We Match the Crew

We recommend the right crew size based on move size, access, heavy items, and timing.

3

Movers Arrive Ready

The crew handles lifting, carrying, loading, unloading, furniture placement, and job flow.

4

You Stay in Control

You keep your transportation plan while our team handles the labor professionally and efficiently.

What We Handle

Loading, Unloading, Carrying, Placement, and Protection

Labor-only moving still requires planning. A rental truck can be damaged by poor stacking. Furniture can get scratched if it is carried without control. Boxes can crush when the load is not balanced.

That is why our labor-only moving crews focus on safe handling, clean communication, and practical loading strategy.

Labor-Only Services Include

  • Truck loading and unloading
  • Storage unit loading and unloading
  • PODS and container loading
  • Furniture moving inside the home or building
  • Disassembly and reassembly support
  • Packing help and box handling
  • Heavy item lifting and careful placement

FAQ

Labor Only Moving Questions

What is labor-only moving?

Labor-only moving means you hire professional movers for the physical work only. You provide the truck, container, trailer, or storage unit, and the crew handles loading, unloading, carrying, placement, and related moving help.

Do you provide a moving truck for labor-only service?

No. Labor-only service is designed for customers who already have transportation arranged. If you need a full-service move with a truck, Atlantic Star Relocations can quote that separately.

Can you load a U-Haul, Penske, Budget truck, or POD?

Yes. We help load and unload rental trucks, moving containers, PODS, trailers, and storage units with organized placement and careful handling.

How many movers do I need?

Small apartment or storage jobs may need 2 movers. Larger apartments, houses, heavy items, stairs, or tight timing may require 3 or 4 movers. The best crew size depends on inventory, access, and truck/container size.

Can labor-only movers help with same-building moves?

Yes. Labor-only service is useful for same-building moves, elevator moves, furniture rearranging, apartment-to-apartment moves, and moving items between rooms, floors, basements, garages, and storage areas.

Do you help with furniture protection?

Yes. The crew can help wrap, pad, carry, and position furniture carefully. For the best result, tell us in advance if blankets, wrap, tape, or special protection materials are needed.

Can you help load a storage unit?

Yes. We help load, unload, and organize storage units so furniture and boxes are placed efficiently and safely.

Do you offer labor-only moving in Westchester County?

Yes. We provide labor-only moving help in New Rochelle, White Plains, Yonkers, Scarsdale, Larchmont, Port Chester, and other Westchester County areas.

Do you offer labor-only moving in NYC, New Jersey, and Connecticut?

Yes. We help with labor-only moving across NYC, Westchester, North Jersey, and Connecticut, depending on crew availability and job details.

What affects the labor-only moving price?

Pricing depends on crew size, number of hours, stairs, elevators, walking distance, heavy items, packing help, truck/container access, service area, and timing.
